fields.label: Server URL
fields.helpText: Your ntfy server URL (defaults to ntfy.sh public server)

fields.label: Access Token
fields.helpText: Optional -- only needed for access-controlled topics

healthcheck_config.description: Validates ntfy server availability via health endpoint

metadata.summary: ntfy open-source push notification service for sending notifications to phones and desktops via simple HTTP.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Go to ntfy.sh (or your self-hosted instance).
2. Optionally create an account for access-controlled topics.
3. Generate an access token under Account -> Access Tokens.
4. Paste the token and server URL here.
